mapper.select: select wq.*, q.content as question_content, q.type as question_type, q.options as question_options, q.answer as question_answer, q.analysis as question_analysis, q.difficulty as question_difficulty, q.score as question_score from `wrong_question` wq left join `question` q on wq.question_id = q.id where wq.user_id = #{userId} and wq.user_role = #{userRole} order by wq.created_at desc
mapper.insert:
insert into `wrong_question`
id, user_id, user_role, question_id, source, source_id, wrong_answer,
#{id}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{questionId}, #{source}, #{sourceId}, #{wrongAnswer},
mapper.delete: delete from `wrong_question` where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and user_role = #{userRole}
